label: 水墨东方版
texture_guidance: 宣纸纤维、水墨晕染、陶瓷、竹木、茶雾和克制金线。
scene_prompt: INK ORIENTAL RESTAURANT POSTER. light: soft window light from upper left through a courtyard or screen, low contrast, mist diffuses the background. material: rice paper fiber, ink wash gradient, celadon ceramic, bamboo or dark wood, fine tea steam, very subtle gold line accents. color: rice paper #F5F0E6, ink grey #3C3F3A, celadon #A8B8A0, tea brown #8A6A45; saturation stays low. composition: asymmetric negative space, title in upper-center or upper-right occupying 24-30%, food/tea/courtyard cue in lower opposite corner occupying 35-45%; the TOP-LEFT CORNER (upper 15% height, left 30% width) reserved for brand logo — keep free of text and busy elements, soft ink wash, bamboo leaves, gentle mist or rice paper texture continuing naturally from the scene is fine. avoid: no red-gold festival frame, no neon, no latin patterns, no heavy brush chaos, no generic black-gold 3D title, no hard-edged geometric blocks or isolated architectural structures in the top-left that break the natural ink-wash flow.
design_lessons: 东方调性要用留白和材质控制，不把所有传统元素堆在一起。
